name: Janus Living, Inc.
business: Janus Living is a pure-play senior housing REIT with a portfolio of 40 senior housing communities comprising 11,252 units as of March 31, 2026. Its communities are located primarily in major retirement markets across 12 states, with units in Florida and Texas representing 67% of the total. Services are primarily paid directly by residents rather than governmental reimbursement programs.
sellsTo: individuals seeking life plan communities with entrance fees

exposures.sentence: We are a pure-play senior housing REIT and the only U.S. publicly traded REIT whose portfolio is owned and operated under RIDEA structures.

catalysts.sentence: We completed the JV Buyout in January 2026, acquired six additional properties in March 2026, and one additional property in May 2026.
